events.title: 4th Grade Field Trip - California Science Museum
events.location: California Science Museum, 700 Museum Way, San Francisco, CA 94107
events.description:
Field trip for 4th Grade to the California Science Museum on Thursday, March 12, 2026.

Schedule:
- 8:30 AM — Depart from school (bus)
- 9:30 AM — Arrive at museum
- 9:30–11:30 AM — Guided tour & exhibits
- 11:30 AM–12:15 PM — Lunch (bring bag lunch)
- 12:15–1:30 PM — Planetarium show & free exploration
- 2:00 PM — Depart museum
- 3:00 PM — Return to school (regular dismissal)

Cost: $15 per student (covers admission, planetarium, and bus).
Payment deadline and permission form due: March 5, 2026 — Permission form is attached; please sign and return by March 5th.

Students should bring: bag lunch (no glass containers), water bottle, comfortable walking shoes, light jacket.

Chaperones needed — email Mr. Johnson if interested.
